cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor; null when no more data

get.description: Returns 200 if DB is reachable; 503 if unavailable. Use for load balancer / k8s probes.

post.summary: Register new device and generate MQTT credentials
Rotate refresh token and issue new access token

post.description: Webhook URL must be public http/https; localhost/private/link-local/metadata targets are rejected.

patch.description: Webhook URL updates are revalidated with the same SSRF policy.

post.summary: Create one-time Telegram linking code (JWT only)

patch.summary: Unlink Telegram from current user (JWT only)

get.summary: Export readings for device/location and period (CSV implemented, PDF backlog)

post.description: Admin-only operation. Returns new MQTT credentials; plaintext password is returned once.
